name: amy-lm
description: Amy — a self-building Nostr client (static browser app). Node is used only for tests/benchmarks; the app itself has no build step.

scripts.test: node bench/unit.bench.mjs && node bench/social.bench.mjs && node bench/engine.bench.mjs && node bench/relay-pool.bench.mjs && node bench/completeness.bench.mjs && node bench/stream.bench.mjs && node bench/view.bench.mjs
scripts.bench: node --expose-gc bench/relay-pool.bench.mjs && node --expose-gc bench/completeness.bench.mjs && node --expose-gc bench/stream.bench.mjs
